# Flutter Mobile Talenta — Unit Test Procedure Implementation

Platform: `flutter-mobile-talenta` · Language: Dart · Test framework: `flutter_test` + `mockito` · Architecture: Clean Architecture + BLoC

---

## Test File Naming <!-- 12 -->

Pattern: `<source_file_name>_test.dart`

Examples:
- `get_announcement_list_use_case.dart` → `get_announcement_list_use_case_test.dart`
- `announcement_list_bloc.dart` → `announcement_list_bloc_test.dart`
- `announcement_repository_impl.dart` → `announcement_repository_impl_test.dart`
- `announcement_mapper.dart` → `announcement_mapper_test.dart`

---

## Test File Location <!-- 17 -->

The project is a monorepo package under `talenta/`. Mirror the source path under `talenta/test/`:

```
Source:  talenta/lib/src/features/<feature>/<layer>/<path>/<file>.dart
Test:    talenta/test/src/features/<feature>/<layer>/<path>/<file>_test.dart
```

Examples:
- `talenta/lib/src/features/talenta_account/domain/usecase/announcement/get_announcement_list_use_case.dart`
  → `talenta/test/src/features/talenta_account/domain/usecase/announcement/get_announcement_list_use_case_test.dart`
- `talenta/lib/src/features/talenta_account/bloc/announcement/index/announcement_list_bloc.dart`
  → `talenta/test/src/features/talenta_account/bloc/announcement/index/announcement_list_bloc_test.dart`

---

## Test File Scaffold <!-- 42 -->

```dart
import 'package:flutter_test/flutter_test.dart';
import 'package:mockito/annotations.dart';
import 'package:mockito/mockito.dart';
// import source under test
// import relevant entities and repositories

@GenerateNiceMocks([
  MockSpec<DependencyInterface>(),
])
import '<test_file_name>_test.mocks.dart';

void main() {
  group('<ClassName>', () {
    late <ClassUnderTest> sut;
    late Mock<DependencyInterface> mockDependency;

    setUp(() {
      mockDependency = Mock<DependencyInterface>();
      sut = <ClassUnderTest>(dependency: mockDependency);
    });

    test('<description>', () async {
      // Arrange
      when(mockDependency.method(params: anyNamed('params')))
          .thenAnswer((_) async => Right(expectedResult));

      // Act
      final result = await sut.call(params);

      // Assert
      expect(result.isRight(), true);
      verify(mockDependency.method(params: params)).called(1);
    });
  });
}
```

---

## Mock Strategy <!-- 11 -->

Uses **mockito** (`package:mockito`) with `@GenerateNiceMocks` or `@GenerateMocks` annotation for code generation.

- `@GenerateNiceMocks` — generated mocks return sensible defaults (null-safe, no setup required for unconfigured methods). Preferred for most cases.
- `@GenerateMocks` — generated mocks throw `MissingStubError` for unconfigured methods. Use when strict verification is needed.

Mock imports are added at the top of each test file with an `import '<test_file>_test.mocks.dart';` directive. The `.mocks.dart` file is auto-generated — never edit it manually.

---

## Mock Location <!-- 12 -->

Each test file has its own companion `.mocks.dart` file generated alongside it:

```
talenta/test/src/features/<feature>/<layer>/<path>/<file>_test.mocks.dart
```

This file is generated by `build_runner` — it does not exist until mock generation is run.

---

## Mock Generation <!-- 25 -->

After adding or changing `@GenerateNiceMocks` / `@GenerateMocks` annotations in any test file, regenerate mocks:

```bash
cd talenta
flutter pub run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
```

This regenerates all `.mocks.dart` files in the `test/` tree.

To watch for changes continuously during development:
```bash
cd talenta
flutter pub run build_runner watch --delete-conflicting-outputs
```

**Steps to add a new mock:**
1. Add `MockSpec<InterfaceName>()` inside the `@GenerateNiceMocks([...])` annotation in the test file.
2. Ensure the `import '<file>_test.mocks.dart';` line is present.
3. Run `flutter pub run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs` from the `talenta/` directory.
4. The generated `Mock<InterfaceName>` class will be available in the test.

---

## Test Naming Convention <!-- 14 -->

Use plain descriptions inside `test()` and `group()` calls:

```dart
group('<ClassName>', () {
  test('returns <Entity> on success', () async { ... });
  test('returns Failure on error', () async { ... });
  test('calls repository with correct params', () async { ... });
});
```

---

## Test Structure (Arrange-Act-Assert) <!-- 33 -->

```dart
test('returns AnnouncementList on success', () async {
  // Arrange
  when(mockRepository.getAnnouncementList(params: testParams))
      .thenAnswer((_) async => const Right<Failure, AnnouncementList>(mockData));

  // Act
  final result = await useCase.call(testParams);

  // Assert
  expect(result.isRight(), true);
  expect(result.getRight().toNullable(), mockData);
  verify(mockRepository.getAnnouncementList(params: testParams)).called(1);
});
```

For BLoC tests, use `bloc_test` package:
```dart
blocTest<AnnouncementListBloc, AnnouncementListState>(
  'emits [Loading, Success] when fetch succeeds',
  build: () => AnnouncementListBloc(useCase: mockUseCase),
  act: (bloc) => bloc.add(const FetchAnnouncementList()),
  expect: () => [
    const AnnouncementListState.loading(),
    AnnouncementListState.success(mockData),
  ],
);
```

---

## Test Runner <!-- 22 -->

Run all unit tests:
```bash
cd talenta
flutter test
```

Run tests in a specific file:
```bash
cd talenta
flutter test test/src/features/<feature>/<layer>/<path>/<file>_test.dart
```

Run tests matching a name pattern:
```bash
cd talenta
flutter test --name "returns AnnouncementList on success"
```

---

## Failure Patterns <!-- 9 -->

| Symptom | Diagnosis | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `MissingStubError` | `@GenerateMocks` used and method not stubbed | Stub the method with `when(...)` or switch to `@GenerateNiceMocks` |
| `type 'Null' is not a subtype of type 'X'` | Mock returns null but return type is non-nullable | Stub the method to return a valid value |
| `Could not find generated mocks file` | `.mocks.dart` not generated | Run `flutter pub run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs` |
| `Expected: Right` but got `Left` | Repository stub returned wrong value | Check `when(...)` condition — params must match exactly or use `any()` |
| BLoC test state mismatch | Extra intermediate states emitted | Add all intermediate states to `expect:` list |
